example-claude-plugin.description: Reference claude-plugin pulled fresh at boot, pinned to an immutable tag for reproducibility (SC-2). Replace source/ref with a real public plugin repo before homelab use.

rtk.description: Binary plugin baked into the golden template at provision time (provision-template.sh); skipped at boot.

gsd.description: npm-global plugin baked into the golden template at provision time (npm install -g); skipped at boot.
